name: The Atchison Golf Club at Bellevue
about: The Atchison Golf Club at Bellevue is a dual-venue facility offering both an outdoor 18-hole championship course and an indoor golf simulator bay area called The Bunker. Established in 1923, the outdoor course features a par-71 layout with mature trees, strategic elevation changes, and challenging terrain. The indoor facility utilizes TrackMan technology for year-round simulator play, practice, lessons, and leagues. Memberships are available but not required, catering to daily players and members alike. The venue also operates a full-service food and beverage operation at The Bunker, offering a complete menu for in-play dining and takeout.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to premium TrackMan simulators with world-famous course replicas
Flexible memberships available without requirement, allowing for daily play or full membership benefits
Comprehensive indoor and outdoor options for practice, leagues, and tournaments in one location

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available at The B indoor facility, with online ordering and takeout options
No mention of alcohol service on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar-based simulators with precise ball tracking and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has its own food and beverage service called The Bunker, offering a full menu. BYOB (bring your own beverages) is not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing a full 18 holes on the simulators. Typically, simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, offering family-friendly events and programs with a focus on golf development for juniors.
